rationale: Current title Civil Engineer at fictional company Initech with no ML, NLP, or IR experience — the summary's marketing manager background and ChatGPT curiosity confirm zero alignment with production AI engineering requirements.

Project Manager and Business Analyst career at manufacturing and fictional companies (Initech) with skills limited to BigQuery and Photoshop — no evidence of any ML, NLP, or search/ranking engineering.

Owns the ranking layer at PharmEasy (evolved hand-tuned scoring to learning-to-rank), shipped XGBoost/LightGBM ranking models at Zoho, holds Elasticsearch expert and Milvus advanced skills, and owns a RAG eval framework — backed by a CMU PhD in ML, covering the core production IR and evaluation requirements.

Entire career in sales, marketing, and mechanical engineering roles across fictional companies (Wayne Enterprises, Initech) and IT services (Wipro) with no production ML or IR engineering work despite holding a PhD in Computer Engineering.

Operations Manager and Customer Support roles at fictional Dunder Mifflin and Infosys IT services with no ML or AI engineering substance — a tier_3 PhD in AI does not correspond to any technical career evidence.

3.7 years as frontend/Java/fullstack engineer at mostly fictional or DevOps-focused companies with self-learner-level AI exposure only; no production IR, ranking, or ML deployment experience, and the MLflow advanced skill is inconsistent with the rest of the profile.
Entire 8-year career as Content Writer, Accountant, and Mechanical Engineer exclusively at IT services firms Infosys and Wipro — no engineering or ML substance whatsoever.

Only 2.4 years total experience split between TCS IT services and fictional Dunder Mifflin in DevOps and Cloud roles; self-described as an ML self-learner with a small RAG side project and no production IR or ranking systems deployment.

11.6-year career entirely in accounting, marketing, and civil engineering at fictional companies (Stark Industries, Wayne Enterprises) and Infosys IT services — no technical AI or engineering experience despite an M.E. in AI from tier_3 SRM Chennai.

Led end-to-end migration from keyword search to embedding-based retrieval at CRED and built a RAG pipeline using OpenAI embeddings and Pinecone, with expert-level OpenSearch and LLM fine-tuning skills from an IIT Roorkee M.E. — directly aligned with the role's core production IR requirements.
